title: cyanothamnus quadrangulus
intro: Cyanothamnus quadrangulus, also known as the Stinkwood or Black Stinkwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae, native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyanothamnus quadrangulus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cyanothamnus quadrangulus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
